languages.text: "Я... я труп! Сшили к-к-клешни... багряного палача... Из чужих лоскутов и ереси! Я — ересь!"
"I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"
languages.original_text: "Я... я труп! Сшили к-к-клешни... багряного палача... Из чужих лоскутов и ереси! Я — ересь!"

traits.locale_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"
"I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"
"I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"
"I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

languages.text: 「私は…私は死体だ！私は赤き屠殺者の爪によって、他者の残骸と異端から縫い合わされた！私は異端だ！」
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! I have been stitched together by the claws of the crimson butcher out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は…私は死体だ！私は赤き屠殺者の爪によって、他者の残骸と異端から縫い合わされた！私は異端だ！」

languages.text: “我……我是一具尸体！猩红屠夫用别人的残骸和异端血肉拼凑出来的怪物——我本身就是异端！”
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: “我……我是一具尸体！猩红屠夫用别人的残骸和异端血肉拼凑出来的怪物——我本身就是异端！”

languages.text: « Je... Je suis un cadavre ! Rapiécé... par les griffes... du boucher écarlate... À partir des vestiges d'autrui et de méthodes hérétiques ! Je suis une hérésie ! »
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: « Je... Je suis un cadavre ! Rapiécé... par les griffes... du boucher écarlate... À partir des vestiges d'autrui et de méthodes hérétiques ! Je suis une hérésie ! »

languages.text: «Soy... ¡Soy un cadáver! ¡Cosido... po... por las garras del... carnicero carmesí con restos ajenos y herejía! ¡Soy herejía!».
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: «Soy... ¡Soy un cadáver! ¡Cosido... po... por las garras del... carnicero carmesí con restos ajenos y herejía! ¡Soy herejía!».

languages.text: "Be... Ben bir cesedim! Kızıl kasabın pe... Pençelerince başkalarının artıklarından ve kâfirlikten dikildim! Ben kâfirliğim!"
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Be... Ben bir cesedim! Kızıl kasabın pe... Pençelerince başkalarının artıklarından ve kâfirlikten dikildim! Ben kâfirliğim!"

languages.text: "Ich ... Ich bin eine Leiche! Zusammengeflickt .... von den K-klauen des ... blutroten Schlachters ... Aus Leichenteilen und Ketzerei! Ich bin Ketzerei!"
languages.original_text: "I... I am a corpse! Stitched together... by the c-claws of the... crimson butcher... Out of others' scraps and heresy! I am heresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... Ich bin eine Leiche! Zusammengeflickt .... von den K-klauen des ... blutroten Schlachters ... Aus Leichenteilen und Ketzerei! Ich bin Ketzerei!"
